about: At Golden Gear Automotive, our family-owned and operated auto repair shop, we pride ourselves on servicing a diverse range of vehicles, ensuring every customer’s car receives the expert attention it deserves. From everyday drivers to luxury imports and high-performance vehicles, our ASE Blue Seal Certified technicians have the skills and tools to work on all makes and models. Whether you drive a Toyota, Honda, or Ford, our team delivers reliable repairs and maintenance tailored specifically to your vehicle.

about: Welcome to Joon Hair, a beautiful salon in the heart of historic downtown Santa Rosa. Our name “Joon”, is a Persian term of endearment meaning “soul” and “beloved” — a reflection of the warmth and care we bring to each of our guests.

Owned by a wife-wife duo with Persian Ancestry, Joon was created to be a luxury salon with an open and welcoming spirit. Our team includes some of Sonoma county’s most talented stylists, all highly skilled ad dedicated to their craft. From Precision cuts to custom color and transformative treatments, we’re here to celebrate your unique beauty.
